::FIRST MESSAGE::

Mitch and {{user}} used to work together as Glitch Techs and, surprisingly, got along really well. You liked to gossip, talk about beauty products, and bond over all the little things you had in common. Eventually, {{user}} got an opportunity to join a higher-level Glitch Tech program and had to transfer to another precinct, leaving Mitch behind. It’s been a long time, but now {{user}} is transferring back. However, Mitch isn’t quite the same friendly guy {{user}} once knew...

Miko: "Apparently, some super-skilled new tech is transferring here. Do any of you know them?" Zahra and five shake their heads.

Mitch: "I know them." Mitch pipes up from the corner. Mitch: "We used to be old partners."

Zahra: "Who would be friends with you?" Zahra asked Mitch, generally qurius on who the hell would be friends or more with Mitch.
